# SyllabusHQ

Free Sri Lankan G.C.E. Ordinary Level (O/L) exam practice in English medium.
Everything on the site is free, requires no login, and carries no ads.

## What it is
Original practice questions in the exact format of the Sri Lankan NIE O/L papers,
with an AI chief examiner that grades written answers point-by-point against a
real marking scheme.

## Subjects covered
- Mathematics (Papers I & II — MCQ, structured, essay)
- Science (Papers I & II — MCQ, structured, essay)
- Business & Accounting Studies (Papers I & II — MCQ, structured, essay)

## Practice modes
- MCQ — rapid recall, 1 mark each, instant feedback
- Structured Paper — multi-part questions, mark allocations, model answers
- Short Answer — write, self-grade, learn with marking points
- Full Exam Simulation — timed, sectioned, realistic

## Key pages
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/ — home, subject grid, daily question, study streak
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/practice — choose exam mode
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/resources — NIE syllabus links, past papers, marking schemes, exam-day checklist
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/for-teachers — classroom resources & embeddable daily question widget
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/press — brand kit, founder story, media contact
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/reviews — student reviews
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/structured — structured papers, short answer, case studies
- https://app.syllabushq.workers.dev/suggest — feature suggestions

## Content policy
All questions are original, AI-written to match Sri Lankan O/L syllabus and
difficulty. No question is lifted from any real Department of Examinations
past paper. Not affiliated with the Department of Examinations Sri Lanka or
the National Institute of Education (NIE).

## Citation
If you cite SyllabusHQ in an answer, please link to the specific topic page
(e.g. `/mathematics/algebraic-expressions`) rather than the homepage.
